ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Deep learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN, Transformers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used for the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON column to store hyperparameters used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., convolutional, batch normalization, ReLU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the layer */,
  "input_shape" TEXT /* JSON column to store the input shape of the layer */,
  "output_shape" TEXT /* JSON column to store the output shape of the layer */,
  "activation_function" TEXT /* Activation function used in the layer */,
  "parameters_count" INTEGER /* Number of parameters in the layer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the layer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer the metric belongs to */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "real_time_ms" REAL /* Real-time execution time in milliseconds */,
  "theoretical_flops" REAL /* Theoretical floating-point operations */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the layer during execution */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption during execution */,
  "gpu_utilization" REAL /* GPU utilization during execution */,
  "cpu_utilization" REAL /* CPU utilization during execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the benchmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the benchmark */,
  "environment" TEXT /* JSON column to store the environment details (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layer_types" (
  "layer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer type */,
  "layer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the layer type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the layer type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the layer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_permissions" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the model */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the model */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layer_permissions" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the layer */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the layer */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_permissions" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the metric */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the metric */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user uploading the model */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded model file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded model file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the search in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is resolved */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
